calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Eric Zhi Feng Feng and Qiyou You; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Shan Ouyang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appatisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Yuzhi Feng to April Yuzhi Feng.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
